heroMessages.title: ForksUp Delicious Meals
heroMessages.description: Satisfy your cravings with our mouth-watering burgers, pizzas, and local favourites, delivered hot and fresh to your doorstep.

heroMessages.title: ForksUp Best Burgers & Pizzas
heroMessages.description: Juicy flame-grilled burgers and authentic Italian pizzas made with premium ingredients. Order your favourite today!

heroMessages.title: ForksUp Local Ghanaian Favourites
heroMessages.description: Enjoy authentic jollof rice, waakye, banku with tilapia, and other local delights made fresh daily.

heroMessages.title: ForksUp Family Meal Deals
heroMessages.description: Feed the whole family with our value-packed meal combos. Great food, great prices, and great taste!

heroMessages.title: Fresh Ingredients
heroMessages.description: We source only the freshest ingredients to prepare every meal with love and care. Quality you can taste!

heroMessages.title: Fast & Reliable Delivery
heroMessages.description: Hot food delivered fast! Track your order in real-time and get notified when your food arrives.
